title: $1,000 in Netflix at Start of 2012
description: What $1,000 invested in Netflix on January 3, 2012 would be worth today. Netflix had just survived the Qwikster debacle — a botched attempt to split DVD and streaming into two companies — which crashed the stock ~75% in late 2011. Buying at the bottom of that crisis required conviction.
dividend_note: Netflix has never paid a dividend.
max_drawdown_note: Netflix fell ~76% in 2022 after reporting its first subscriber loss in over a decade.
educational_note: Netflix's 7:1 split in 2015 converted 104 shares to 729 shares. The company went through two separate 70%+ crashes during this holding period — both eventually recovered.
